name: redstick-brief
description: Redstick Ventures pre-meeting brief generator. /brief reads today's calendar, pulls Gmail thread history + Otter conversation-summary emails + a 4-stage WebSearch+WebFetch research pipeline (anchor / direct page fetch / targeted recency / long-tail anomaly sources like Wayback Machine + GitHub + job postings), and produces a one-page sharp briefing. /setup-daily-brief wires up the daily 6 AM email routine in one command.
